calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-423 R1/R2/R3 readiness-validation diagnostic
items.note: EXPERIMENT_PURPOSE=diagnostic, claim_ids=[] -- validates the MECH-423 super-additivity readiness INSTRUMENTATION (R1 shared-latent grad coupling, R2 iterative-inference convergence, R3 interleaved cross-module consolidation) is NON-VACUOUS on a briefly-trained substrate. This is the readiness GATE for EXP-0380, NOT the EXP-0380 ablation itself -- do NOT mark EVB-0143/EXP-0380 executed on this run's PASS. Self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue if a readout is starved (V3-EXQ-643-style preconditions assert the same statistic each criterion routes on). PASS unblocks the separate EXP-0380 3-arm super-additivity ablation session. Smoke PASS 2026-06-14 (R1 coupled / R2 converged / R3 interleaved=1.0 vs blocked=0.0).
